$meta.step: Step 2 — Design System and UX Foundation
$meta.description: Semantic colour tokens for the canonical light theme. Every semantic token references a primitive and never restates a hex value. Components reference these tokens and never a primitive. Light theme is the canonical MVP theme; dark mode is PLANNED and NOT IMPLEMENTED — no dark theme token file exists and none may be claimed.

color.semantic.primary.description: Primary actions, active navigation, primary buttons, focused field borders.
color.semantic.primary.intendedUsage: Primary actions, active navigation, primary buttons, focused field borders.
prohibitedUsage: Never a page background.
Never used for destructive actions.
color.semantic.primary.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.700 (#0A4F8F). Measured 8.31:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.primary.hover.description: Hover and pressed treatment for primary actions on pointer devices.
color.semantic.primary.hover.intendedUsage: Hover and pressed treatment for primary actions on pointer devices.
prohibitedUsage: Never a resting state.
color.semantic.primary.hover.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.800 (#083D70). Measured 10.98:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.primary.surface.description: Tinted surface behind primary-flavoured content, selected rows, and active navigation items.
color.semantic.primary.surface.intendedUsage: Tinted surface behind primary-flavoured content, selected rows, and active navigation items.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.primary.surface.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.50 (#F0F6FC). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.secondary.description: Secondary emphasis, links inside dense content, secondary buttons.
color.semantic.secondary.intendedUsage: Secondary emphasis, links inside dense content, secondary buttons.
prohibitedUsage: Never the only differentiator between two adjacent actions.
color.semantic.secondary.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.500 (#2A6FA9). Measured 5.32:1 on the page surface and 5.01:1 on the raised surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target on both.

color.semantic.accent.description: Restrained brand accent: a thin rule, a small badge fill, a wordmark flourish.
color.semantic.accent.intendedUsage: Restrained brand accent: a thin rule, a small badge fill, a wordmark flourish.
prohibitedUsage: Never body text.
Never the sole indicator of a warning or any status.
Never a dominant surface.
Never a meaning-bearing boundary.
color.semantic.accent.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.gold.400 (#C79A2B). Measured 2.6:1. Decorative only; carries no meaning.

color.semantic.accent.strong.description: The only gold permitted to carry text or a meaning-bearing boundary.
color.semantic.accent.strong.intendedUsage: The only gold permitted to carry text or a meaning-bearing boundary.
prohibitedUsage: Never used as a large fill.
color.semantic.accent.strong.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.gold.600 (#8A6710). Measured 5.21:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.success.description: Successful completion: payment recorded, sync acknowledged by the server, QC passed.
color.semantic.success.intendedUsage: Successful completion: payment recorded, sync acknowledged by the server, QC passed.
prohibitedUsage: Never used to imply a payment the server has not acknowledged.
color.semantic.success.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.green.500 (#0F7A3D). Measured 5.42:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.success.surface.description: Background of success banners and success status chips.
color.semantic.success.surface.intendedUsage: Background of success banners and success status chips.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.success.surface.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.green.50 (#E8F5EC). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.warning.description: Attention needed but not yet failed: approaching a limit, order ageing, reminder due.
color.semantic.warning.intendedUsage: Attention needed but not yet failed: approaching a limit, order ageing, reminder due.
prohibitedUsage: Never the sole indicator of a warning — an icon and text are always present.
color.semantic.warning.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.amber.500 (#9A5B00). Measured 5.43:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.warning.surface.description: Background of warning banners and warning status chips.
color.semantic.warning.surface.intendedUsage: Background of warning banners and warning status chips.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.warning.surface.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.amber.50 (#FDF3E4). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.danger.description: Destructive and failed states: void, refund, failed delivery, failed sync, validation error.
color.semantic.danger.intendedUsage: Destructive and failed states: void, refund, failed delivery, failed sync, validation error.
prohibitedUsage: Never used for a merely cautionary state.
Never the default action colour in a confirmation dialog.
color.semantic.danger.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.red.500 (#B3261E). Measured 6.54:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.danger.surface.description: Background of error banners and danger status chips.
color.semantic.danger.surface.intendedUsage: Background of error banners and danger status chips.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.danger.surface.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.red.50 (#FCEBEA). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.information.description: Neutral informational messages and help text that must be noticed.
color.semantic.information.intendedUsage: Neutral informational messages and help text that must be noticed.
prohibitedUsage: Never used to convey success or failure.
color.semantic.information.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.600 (#1F5E96). Measured 6.77:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.information.surface.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.100 (#DBE9F6). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.neutral.description: Neutral status and secondary metadata that must remain readable.
color.semantic.neutral.intendedUsage: Neutral status and secondary metadata that must remain readable.
prohibitedUsage: Never used for a state that requires action.
color.semantic.neutral.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.600 (#566070). Measured 6.36:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.focus.description: The focus ring. Rendered as a 2px outline with a 2px offset on every focusable element.
color.semantic.focus.intendedUsage: The focus ring. Rendered as a 2px outline with a 2px offset on every focusable element.
prohibitedUsage: The focus indicator is never removed, never set to none, and never reduced below 3:1 against its adjacent background.
color.semantic.focus.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.700 (#0A4F8F). Measured 8.31:1 on the page surface — meets the 3:1 interactive-boundary target.

color.semantic.selected.description: Selection state for rows, chips, list items and segmented controls.
color.semantic.selected.intendedUsage: Selection state for rows, chips, list items and segmented controls.
prohibitedUsage: Selection is never conveyed by this colour alone; a checkmark, a filled control, or a text label always accompanies it.
color.semantic.selected.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.600 (#1F5E96). Measured 6.77:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.selected.surface.description: Background fill of a selected row or chip.
color.semantic.selected.surface.intendedUsage: Background fill of a selected row or chip.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.selected.surface.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.100 (#DBE9F6). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

prohibitedUsage: Never used for active content.
Never the only signal that a control is unavailable — a reason is always available to the user.
color.semantic.disabled.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.400 (#9AA3B0). Measured 2.55:1. WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.3 exempts inactive components; a disabled control always carries an explanatory label as well.

color.semantic.offline.description: The device has no usable connection. Distinct from PENDING, SYNCING and FAILED.
color.semantic.offline.intendedUsage: The device has no usable connection. Distinct from PENDING, SYNCING and FAILED.
prohibitedUsage: Never conflated with a sync failure.
Never hidden to keep the interface tidy.
color.semantic.offline.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.700 (#3E4756). Measured 9.37:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.syncing.description: A queued operation is currently being sent to the server. Not yet acknowledged.
color.semantic.syncing.intendedUsage: A queued operation is currently being sent to the server. Not yet acknowledged.
prohibitedUsage: Never used to imply the server has accepted the operation.
color.semantic.syncing.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.teal.500 (#0F6E7B). Measured 5.94:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.syncing.surface.description: Background of the sync indicator chip.
color.semantic.syncing.surface.intendedUsage: Background of the sync indicator chip.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.syncing.surface.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.teal.50 (#E6F3F5). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.conflict.description: Local and server state disagree and a human must decide. Bahasa Indonesia label: Perlu Diperiksa.
color.semantic.conflict.intendedUsage: Local and server state disagree and a human must decide. Bahasa Indonesia label: Perlu Diperiksa.
prohibitedUsage: Never auto-resolved.
Never silently overwritten by either side.
color.semantic.conflict.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.violet.500 (#7A3B8F). Measured 7.37:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.conflict.surface.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.violet.50 (#F3EBF6). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.surface.page.description: Canonical page background for the light theme.
color.semantic.surface.page.intendedUsage: Canonical page background for the light theme.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.surface.page.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.0 (#FFFFFF). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.surface.raised.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.50 (#F7F8FA). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.surface.sunken.description: Sunken wells, table header rows, and inactive tab strips.
color.semantic.surface.sunken.intendedUsage: Sunken wells, table header rows, and inactive tab strips.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.surface.sunken.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.100 (#EFF1F4). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

prohibitedUsage: Never rendered below 4.5:1 against its surface.
color.semantic.text.primary.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.900 (#171C24). Measured 17.1:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.text.secondary.description: Secondary text, metadata, timestamps and helper text.
color.semantic.text.secondary.intendedUsage: Secondary text, metadata, timestamps and helper text.
prohibitedUsage: Never used for the only copy that explains how to recover from an error.
color.semantic.text.secondary.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.700 (#3E4756). Measured 9.37:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.text.onPrimary.description: Text and icons placed on color.semantic.primary.
color.semantic.text.onPrimary.intendedUsage: Text and icons placed on color.semantic.primary.
prohibitedUsage: Never placed on a light surface.
color.semantic.text.onPrimary.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.0 (#FFFFFF). Measured 8.31:1 on color.semantic.primary, 6.54:1 on danger, 5.42:1 on success, 5.43:1 on warning — every filled surface it is permitted on meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target. It is never placed on a light surface.

prohibitedUsage: Never used as the boundary of an interactive control.
Never the only signal that two regions differ.
color.semantic.border.subtle.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.300 (#C4CAD3). Measured 1.65:1. Decorative only; carries no meaning.

color.semantic.border.interactive.description: The resting boundary of every interactive control: inputs, checkboxes, radios, switches, bordered buttons.
color.semantic.border.interactive.intendedUsage: The resting boundary of every interactive control: inputs, checkboxes, radios, switches, bordered buttons.
prohibitedUsage: Never reduced below 3:1 against the adjacent surface.
color.semantic.border.interactive.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.500 (#737D8C). Measured 4.17:1 on the page surface — meets the 3:1 interactive-boundary target.

color.semantic.border.description: The default border of an interactive control. Synonym-free alias of the interactive boundary; components may name either.
color.semantic.border.intendedUsage: The default border of an interactive control. Synonym-free alias of the interactive boundary; components may name either.
prohibitedUsage: Never reduced below 3:1 against the adjacent surface.
color.semantic.border.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.500 (#737D8C). Measured 4.17:1 on the page surface — meets the 3:1 interactive-boundary target.

color.semantic.border.strong.description: A heavier boundary for emphasis: a focused table cell, a selected card outline, a high-attention container.
color.semantic.border.strong.intendedUsage: A heavier boundary for emphasis: a focused table cell, a selected card outline, a high-attention container.
prohibitedUsage: Never used as a decorative divider — that is color.semantic.border.subtle.
color.semantic.border.strong.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.700 (#3E4756). Measured 9.37:1 on the page surface — meets the 3:1 interactive-boundary target.

color.semantic.primary.pressed.description: The pressed state of a primary action, one step darker than the hover treatment.
color.semantic.primary.pressed.intendedUsage: The pressed state of a primary action, one step darker than the hover treatment.
prohibitedUsage: Never a resting state.
color.semantic.primary.pressed.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.blue.900 (#0A2540). Measured 15.54:1 on the page surface — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.surface.description: The default surface. Alias of the page surface for components that do not distinguish page from container.
color.semantic.surface.intendedUsage: The default surface. Alias of the page surface for components that do not distinguish page from container.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.surface.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.0 (#FFFFFF). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.surface.inverse.description: An inverted surface: tooltips, snackbars, and the dark app bar variant.
color.semantic.surface.inverse.intendedUsage: An inverted surface: tooltips, snackbars, and the dark app bar variant.
prohibitedUsage: Never a large page background — the light theme is the canonical MVP theme.
color.semantic.surface.inverse.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.900 (#171C24). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

prohibitedUsage: Never placed on a light surface.
color.semantic.text.inverse.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.0 (#FFFFFF). Measured 17.1:1 on color.semantic.surface.inverse — meets the 4.5:1 normal-text target.

color.semantic.text.disabled.description: The label of an inactive control.
color.semantic.text.disabled.intendedUsage: The label of an inactive control.
prohibitedUsage: Never used for active text.
Never the only signal that a control is unavailable — a reason is always available.
color.semantic.text.disabled.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.400 (#9AA3B0). Measured 2.55:1. WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.3 exempts inactive components; a disabled control always carries an explanatory label.

color.semantic.neutral.subtle.description: A quiet neutral fill: a metadata chip, an inactive tab, a zebra table row.
color.semantic.neutral.subtle.intendedUsage: A quiet neutral fill: a metadata chip, an inactive tab, a zebra table row.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
color.semantic.neutral.subtle.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.neutral.100 (#EFF1F4). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.

color.semantic.conflict.subtle.description: A quieter conflict fill for a row that needs review without shouting across the whole table.
color.semantic.conflict.subtle.intendedUsage: A quieter conflict fill for a row that needs review without shouting across the whole table.
prohibitedUsage: Never a foreground colour.
Never used to de-emphasise a conflict into invisibility.
color.semantic.conflict.subtle.accessibilityNotes: Resolves to color.violet.100 (#E0C9E8). Background role; foreground tokens meet their own targets against it.
